title: GrassNotFloating
description: Prevent the grass generation from taking place on air blocks
body:
This is a very simple mod that prevents `minecraft:grass` from generating on air blocks.

Loaded chunks in existing world will not be affected.

Support advanced block registry name configuration.

[![image](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/75401fe6-76e7-471c-89e5-1edd37a950ad.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/kasualix)
